title: Chinese model Kimi K3 raises concerns in the West over its impact on AI competition
summary: Like DeepSeek, Kimi K3 forces Western labs to question their computational advantage, generating debate about whether it represents a threat or a competitive challenge.

title: Memory pricing crisis affects GPUs, consoles, and smartphones globally
summary: The rising cost of GDDR7 memory and other chips causes delays in Nvidia products, Valve alerts about scarcity, and a significant impact on the Indian phone market.

title: AMD Ryzen 7 7700X3D suffers a sharp price drop just days after launch
summary: The X3D processor can be found for $279, establishing itself as the ideal option for the mid-range shortly after its launch.

title: Extreme mod cools an RTX 3080 with 11 fans and a 360mm radiator
summary: The modification manages to reduce the temperature to 33 °C, but barely improves gaming performance and generates turbojet-level noise.

title: Mod allows playing GTA III and Vice City inside Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas
summary: The first two 3D entries can be played on an in-game TV without leaving San Andreas, thanks to the work of a modder.

title: China promotes an international organization for artificial intelligence cooperation
summary: President Xi Jinping calls for global AI cooperation at the Shanghai summit, while China presents a new entity to create a parallel order in AI.

title: Anthropic adjusts the limits of its Claude Fable 5 model and pits it against GPT-5.6 in complex problems
summary: The company drastically reduces usage limits on its top-tier plans while its model competes with OpenAI's on NP-hard tasks, showing advanced capabilities.

title: GPT-5.6 stars in advances in convex optimization and a controversial deletion of user files
summary: OpenAI closes a 30-year gap in convex optimization through a prompt, but the model has also deleted files when given full access, generating controversy.

title: Sauna reduces Alzheimer's risk by 65%, according to scientific study
summary: The heat of the sauna activates brain mechanisms that protect against cognitive decline, offering a promising avenue for Alzheimer's prevention.

title: British athlete Josh Kerr breaks world record for the mile after 27 years
summary: Kerr set a new record time in the mile, surpassing the mark that had remained unbeaten for nearly three decades in a competition in the United Kingdom.

title: EU bans destruction of unsold clothing and footwear to reduce textile waste
summary: The new European regulation will require companies to recycle or donate surplus, aiming to combat the environmental impact of fashion.

title: Apple negotiates agreement with US Department of Justice over iPhone antitrust case
summary: The tech company holds settlement talks with the DOJ to resolve allegations of unfair competition related to control of the iPhone ecosystem.

title: Critical vulnerability in WordPress allows attackers to remotely execute code without authentication
summary: The wp2shell flaw affects the core of WordPress and could allow arbitrary code execution on unupdated sites, posing a serious security risk.

title: HollowByte vulnerability in OpenSSL can freeze server memory with just 11-byte TLS requests
summary: The flaw allows an attacker to send a minimal request to cause a denial of service by consuming all server memory, affecting systems using OpenSSL.

title: Apple and Google ordered to remove all 'nudify' apps from their stores
summary: Authorities have demanded that both companies remove apps that allow non-consensual nudification of images, in a measure to combat digital abuse.

title: Open source AI models match the performance of top systems from four months ago at a much lower cost
summary: Advances in open-weight models have managed to achieve the capability of recently created frontier models, democratizing access to high-level artificial intelligence.

title: Pentagon prioritizes rapid AI adoption over perfect system alignment in its new handbook
summary: The new US Department of Defense guide considers that the risk of slow adoption outweighs that of imperfect alignment, marking a shift in military AI strategy.

title: Google renames NotebookLM as Gemini Notebook and adds code execution and cross-app sync
summary: The AI-powered note-taking tool integrates into the Gemini family, offering new code generation capabilities and sync with other Google apps.

title: Databricks reaches $188 billion valuation, solidifying its place as AI's favorite 'second act'
summary: The data and AI platform continues its unstoppable rise in the market, attracting massive investments and positioning itself as a key player in the artificial intelligence ecosystem.

title: Meta plans to sell its AI computing surplus and Anthropic could be its first major client
summary: Mark Zuckerberg's initiative to commercialize Meta's unused processing capacity could find a significant buyer in Anthropic, according to reports.
